project_type: Python self-evolving AI development kernel - a framework that orchestrates AI coding agents via filesystem-based state and prompts
build_system: pip/setuptools - lightweight, no heavy framework dependencies (no LangGraph, no CrewAI). Only PyYAML, pytest, pytest-cov as dependencies.
test_framework: pytest with pytest-cov for coverage (target 90%+). Tests in tests/ directory with conftest.py.
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest with coverage: python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov=kernel --cov=knowledge --cov=memory --cov=runner --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90. 2. Verify runner.py can be imported without errors: python3.12 -c 'import runner'. 3. Verify kernel modules can be imported: python3.12 -c 'from kernel import evolution; from knowledge import store; from memory import state_manager'
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/AI-Coding-Guidance-Skills. 2. python3.12 -m pip install pyyaml pytest pytest-cov. 3. python3.12 -m pytest tests/ -v
environment_constraints: Python 3.12 available at python3.12. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - can install any packages. No Docker needed. Keep kernel lightweight with minimal deps (only PyYAML for yaml parsing).
contribution_requirements: Keep existing skills (grill-me, grill-with-docs, handoff, diagnose, etc.) untouched. New kernel code goes in kernel/, knowledge/, memory/, tests/ directories plus runner.py at root. Copy external skills (ralph, ui-ux) into the skills/ subdirectory within knowledge/skills/.
key_patterns: Skills use SKILL.md as their entry point with YAML frontmatter (name, description). Ralph uses a bash loop that spawns fresh AI instances per iteration with prd.json tracking progress. The kernel should follow this same loop-with-fresh-context pattern but in Python. UI/UX skills have symlinks that need to be resolved (copy actual files from src/ui-ux-pro-max/).
directory_structure: Root: /projects/sandbox/AI-Coding-Guidance-Skills/. Existing skills at root level (grill-me/, diagnose/, etc.). New structure adds: kernel/ (BOOT.md, constitution.md, graph.yaml, state.yaml, philosophy/, prompts/, evolution/), knowledge/ (store.py, rules/, skills/, patterns/), memory/ (current_goal.md, plan.md, progress.yaml, decisions.jsonl, reflections.jsonl), tests/ (all test files), runner.py at root.
